name: Strawberry Jewels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except powdered sugar.
3. Beat at low speed until well mixed, scraping the bowl often.
4. Shape rounded teaspoons of dough into 1-inch balls.
5. Place the balls 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
7. Allow to cool completely before sprinkling with powdered sugar.
YIELD: 3 1/2 dozen
